name: Atlassian Terminated Accounts Still Active
description: Detects terminated employees that still have active access in atlassian.
query: SELECT u.account_id AS id, u.email_address AS email, e.termination_date FROM atlassian_users u JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.email_address, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(u.active, true) = true
remediation: Disable or remove provider access for terminated employees within 24 hours and verify all active sessions are revoked.
